mapper.select: select id, task_id, trace_id, document_id, config_id, target_table, mapping_profile, storage_json, unique_key_json, storage_status, duplicate_strategy, error_message, stored_by, stored_at, created_at, updated_at from storage_result_record where task_id = #{taskId}

select target_table as table_name, target_table as table_cn_name, target_table as description, count(1) as row_count, min(mapping_profile) as related_configs, max(stored_at) as last_stored_at from storage_result_record
storage_status = 'SUCCESS'
and (target_table like #{keywordLike} or mapping_profile like #{keywordLike})
group by target_table order by max(stored_at) desc
mapper.update: update storage_result_record set config_id = #{configId}, target_table = #{targetTable}, mapping_profile = #{mappingProfile}, storage_json = #{storageJson}, unique_key_json = #{uniqueKeyJson}, storage_status = #{storageStatus}, duplicate_strategy = #{duplicateStrategy}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, stored_by = #{storedBy}, stored_at = #{storedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where task_id = #{taskId}
